Photos and biometric data (via Amazon Photos, photos app)

used_for_profiling.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — extensive user profiling for recommendations and advertising

access_your_data.source_quote: Users can download their data via Account Settings; limited export features available

delete_your_data.source_quote: Users can delete account and request data deletion, though legal holds may apply

correct_inaccuracies.source_quote: Users can update account information, address, and preferences

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: No sale occurs; targeted advertising can be limited via settings

data_portability.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — limited data portability; some export features available

appeal_decisions.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — appeal mechanisms not clearly documented

encrypted_at_rest.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — encryption at rest for sensitive data

mfa_available.source_quote: Two-factor authentication available via OTP and authenticator apps

breach_notification.source_quote: Amazon notifies customers of security breaches as legally required

independent_audits.source_quote: AWS (Amazon's cloud subsidiary) undergoes SOC 2 and ISO 27001 audits; Amazon.com audits available on request

honors_gpc.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Amazon does not honor Global Privacy Control

honors_dnt.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Amazon does not honor Do Not Track signals

childrens_privacy.notes: Compliant with COPPA; parental controls available for Amazon Kids and FreeTime

gaps: Detailed third-party recipient list not publicly available

Video surveillance and facial recognition data handling unclear

Cross-Amazon service data sharing not fully transparent
label_notes: Source: training knowledge. Amazon collects extensive data across shopping, devices (Echo, Ring, Alexa), and services. Heavy reliance on data for personalization, recommendations, and advertising. The company integrates data across multiple services for user profiling. Does not sell personal data but shares with subsidiaries and service providers. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
